extension.summary: TheAudioDB Helper - Music metadata and video links powered by TheAudioDB
TheAudioDB Helper - Metadatos musicales y enlaces de vídeo de TheAudioDB
extension.description: Search TheAudioDB for video links, biographies, similar artists, and metadata for artists in your music database. Provides artist DBID resolution, biography retrieval from multiple sources (TheAudioDB, Wikipedia, Last.fm), and similar artists with images. Needs skin support and a working YouTube plugin.

Busca videoclips, biografías, artistas similares y metadatos en TheAudioDB para los artistas de tu biblioteca musical. Proporciona resolución de DBID del artista, obtención de biografías desde múltiples fuentes (TheAudioDB, Wikipedia, Last.fm) y artistas similares con imágenes. Requiere soporte en el skin y el plugin de YouTube funcionando.
extension.news: v1.0.4 - Robustness fixes: safe JSON-RPC construction, error handling in get_songs_for_artist, resource cleanup in process_all_artists, solid icon, xbmc.python 3.0.1.
